view.title: Validate persona scenario #3
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the specific requirements.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 3 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the specific requirements.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the specific requirements.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the persona scenario 'Trial account data sandboxing', but the evidence does not provide clear confirmation of the necessary conditions for this scenario to be executed successfully. Specifically, there is no direct evidence confirming the existence of an Instagram Business account with booking integration, nor is there confirmation of the mini-booking interface's functionality within Instagram/Facebook. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive verdict regarding the validation of the scenario.
